originalTitle: Senegal approves tougher anti-gay law as rights groups raise concerns
title: Senegal approves tougher anti-gay law as rights groups raise concerns
content: "Violence and fear" will spike and "equality and non-discrimination" will be trampled on, warn critics.

originalTitle: Chinese national arrested over attempt to smuggle 2,000 queen ants from Kenya
title: Chinese national arrested over attempt to smuggle 2,000 queen ants from Kenya
content: The suspect had packed some ants in test tubes while others were concealed in tissue paper rolls, prosecutor says.

originalTitle: Why Namibia's green energy dream could be a red flag for penguins
title: Why Namibia's green energy dream could be a red flag for penguins
content: A near pristine desert and coastal wilderness in Namibia could soon host a huge hydrogen production facility.

originalTitle: Dubai high-rise building damaged in overnight drone hit
title: Dubai high-rise building damaged in overnight drone hit
content: Video shows damage to a Dubai high-rise building hit by a drone.

originalTitle: Chile’s new far-right president is sworn in
title: Chile’s new far-right president is sworn in
content: Chile’s new president Jose Antonio Kast has been sworn in, marking a sharp shift to the right in the country’s politics.

originalTitle: Iran says it targets Israeli bases, accuses Israel of targeting hospitals
title: Iran says it targets Israeli bases, accuses Israel of targeting hospitals
content: Missile alert alarms sound in Jerusalem as the Israeli military says it launches another round of 'wide-scale' strikes.

originalTitle: 'Fingers on the trigger': Deadly warnings for Iranians being urged to take action
title: 'Fingers on the trigger': Deadly warnings for Iranians being urged to take action
content: Iran's police chief has warned that his forces would treat anyone taking to the streets "at the enemy's request" as an enemy.

originalTitle: China approves 'ethnic unity' law requiring minorities to learn Mandarin
title: China approves 'ethnic unity' law requiring minorities to learn Mandarin
content: The law states that children should be taught Mandarin before kindergarten, until the end of high school.

originalTitle: Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBC
title: Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBC
content: Modelling agent used businesses to recruit girls and arrange US visas to visit Jeffrey Epstein, Brazilian women tell BBC.

originalTitle: The 24 hours that damaged the Premier League's best-in-the-world reputation
title: The 24 hours that damaged the Premier League's best-in-the-world reputation
content: Phil McNulty examines the state of the Premier League after none of its six Champions League entrants won this week.

originalTitle: Most underrated player on the planet? Valverde steps up for Real
title: Most underrated player on the planet? Valverde steps up for Real
content: Jude Bellingham stood open mouthed in disbelief while Kylian Mbappe jumped out of his seat to celebrate as Real Madrid team-mate Federico Valverde scored a stunning hat-trick to sink Manchester City in their Champions League first-leg tie.

originalTitle: Arsenal undone by own set-piece weapon as 100% record ends in Germany
title: Arsenal undone by own set-piece weapon as 100% record ends in Germany
content: "You do it too, eh?". Those were the words from Arsenal's set-piece coach Nicolas Jover to Bayer Leverkusen manager Kasper Hjulmand after the German side scored from a corner in the 1-1 Champions League last-16 first-leg draw between the two sides.
